description_long: This is a modern pump-action shotgun with a distinctive blue-gray digital camouflage pattern covering the main body and barrel. The shotgun features a black pistol grip and a matching black fore-end pump, both ergonomically shaped for secure handling. The barrel is long and metallic, with a matte silver finish and no visible ribbing or venting. On the side of the receiver, there are several red shotgun shells held in a side saddle shell holder, adding a tactical element. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger access. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A pump-action shotgun with blue-gray digital camouflage, black pistol grip, and a side-mounted shell holder. The design is robust and tactical, with a long metallic barrel and ergonomic features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, digital camouflage pattern, black pistol grip, and the pump handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's circular opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shell holder with red shells and the full length of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pistol grip, trigger guard, and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long, with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
